mapper.sql: select id, task_id, bid_id, file_role, file_name, original_name, file_url, file_size, file_type, parse_status, extracted_text, enabled, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag from tdw_duplicate_file
mapper.select: where task_id = #{taskId} and file_role = 'source' and del_flag = '0' order by create_time desc, id desc limit 1
where task_id = #{taskId} and file_role = 'compare' and del_flag = '0' and ifnull(enabled, '1') = '1' order by create_time asc, id asc
select count(1) from tdw_duplicate_file where task_id = #{taskId} and file_role = 'compare' and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into tdw_duplicate_file(task_id, bid_id, file_role, file_name, original_name, file_url, file_size, file_type, parse_status, extracted_text, enabled, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag) values(#{taskId}, #{bidId}, #{fileRole}, #{fileName}, #{originalName}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileSize}, #{fileType}, #{parseStatus}, #{extractedText}, #{enabled}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark}, #{delFlag})
mapper.delete:
update tdw_duplicate_file set del_flag = '2', update_time = now() where id in
#{id}

update tdw_duplicate_file set del_flag = '2', update_time = now() where task_id in
#{id}
